title: Intimate Lighting
writer: Jaroslav Papousek, Ivan Passer, Václav Sasek
actors: Karel Blazek, Zdenek Bezusek, Vera Kresadlová
plot: One of the most important films of the Czech New Wave 60s, it was ranked among the top ten domestic films of all time. In this original sad comedy set in a small town, two classmates meet each other for the first time in ten years...
